hooks.message: Dangerous command detected: rm -rf. This will permanently delete files.

hooks.injectPrompt:
Before concluding, verify:
1. All tests pass (npm test)
2. No lint errors (npm run lint)
3. Changes are committed (git status)

Project rules:
- Use TDD: write failing test first, then implementation
- Follow TypeScript strict mode
- Commit small, focused changes

hooks._comment: Modify capability: exec hook prints a JSON modify instruction to stdout. Here, rewrite a bash command to a safer form before execution (tool_call input patch).
Modify capability: force a tool_result to non-error after a hook inspects it (partial patch; omitted fields keep current values).
